choose.otherwise: AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT b.board_id AS boardId, b.title, b.writer, b.read_cnt AS readCount, b.created_at AS createdAt, COUNT(f.file_id) AS fileCount FROM reactboard b LEFT JOIN reactboard_file f ON b.board_id = f.board_id WHERE 1=1
AND b.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND b.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND b.writer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
GROUP BY b.board_id ORDER BY b.board_id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{recordSize}
SELECT board_id, title, content, writer, read_cnt AS read_count, created_at FROM reactboard WHERE board_id = #{boardId}
SELECT file_id, board_id, original_name, save_name, file_size FROM reactboard_file WHERE board_id = #{boardId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reactboard (title, content, writer) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{writer})

INSERT INTO reactboard_file (board_id, original_name, save_name, file_size) VALUES
(#{file.boardId}, #{file.originalName}, #{file.saveName}, #{file.fileSize})
mapper.select: SELECT file_id AS fileId, board_id AS boardId, original_name AS originalName, save_name AS saveName, file_size AS fileSize, created_at AS createdAt FROM reactboard_file WHERE file_id = #{fileId}
